message:
feat(web): add multipart form data parser + fix health.rs imports (asupersync-hmqdk)

Multipart extractor implementing FromRequest for multipart/form-data bodies
per RFC 7578. Boundary extraction, Content-Disposition parsing, binary/text
field support, preamble handling, LF-tolerant. 31 tests.

Also fixes health.rs Handler import for test compilation and applies
rustfmt to both modules.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
